debug_info.goal:
x y z w : в„•
ht : 1 < x вҲ§ 1 < y вҲ§ 1 < z
hw : 0 вүӨ w
h0 : Real.log вҶ‘w / Real.log вҶ‘x = 24
h1 : Real.log вҶ‘w / Real.log вҶ‘y = 40
h2 : Real.log вҶ‘w / Real.log (вҶ‘x * вҶ‘y * вҶ‘z) = 12
вҠў Real.log вҶ‘w / Real.log вҶ‘z = 60

proof:
have hx_log : Real.log вҶ‘x вү  0 := (Real.log_pos (by positivity)).ne.symm
  have hy_log : Real.log вҶ‘y вү  0 := (Real.log_pos (by positivity)).ne.symm
  have hxyz_log : Real.log (вҶ‘x * вҶ‘y * вҶ‘z) вү  0 := (Real.log_pos (by positivity)).ne.symm
  have hw_nz : Real.log вҶ‘w вү  0 := by
    have : Real.log вҶ‘w = 24 * Real.log вҶ‘x := by field_simp [hx_log] at h0; linarith
    have : 0 < Real.log вҶ‘x := Real.log_pos (by positivity)
    linarith
  have hx : Real.log вҶ‘x = Real.log вҶ‘w / 24 := by field_simp [hx_log] at h0; field_simp [h0]; linarith
  have hy : Real.log вҶ‘y = Real.log вҶ‘w / 40 := by field_simp [hy_log] at h1; field_simp [h1]; linarith
  have hxyz' : Real.log (вҶ‘x * вҶ‘y * вҶ‘z) = Real.log вҶ‘w / 12 := by field_simp [hxyz_log] at h2; field_simp [h2]; linarith
  have hz : Real.log вҶ‘z = Real.log вҶ‘w / 60 := by
    rw [Real.log_mul (by positivity) (by positivity), Real.log_mul (by positivity) (by positivity)] at hxyz'
    rw [hx, hy] at hxyz'; field_simp [hw_nz] at hxyz' вҠў; linarith
  rw [hz]; field_simp [hw_nz]
